title: Hours of service - Canada.ca
content:
The GST/HST Registry service is available from Monday to Saturday during the hours shown in the table below:
British Columbia and Yukon (Pacific time)
1:30 a.m. to midnight
2:30 a.m. to 2:00 p.m.
Alberta, Northwest Territories, and Nunavut (Mountain time)
2:30 a.m. to 1:00 a.m.
Midnight to 1:00 a.m. 3:30 a.m. to 3:00 p.m.
Saskatchewan*, Manitoba, Northwest Territories, and Nunavut (Central time)
3:30 a.m. to 2:00 a.m.
Midnight to 2:00 a.m. 4:30 a.m. to 4 p.m.
Ontario, Québec, and Nunavut (Eastern time)
4:30 a.m. to 3:00 a.m.
Midnight to 3:00 a.m. 5:30 a.m. to 5 p.m.
New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, and PEI (Atlantic time)
5:30 a.m. to 4:00 a.m.
1:00 a.m. to 4:00 a.m. 6:30 a.m. to 6 p.m.
Newfoundland and Labrador (Newfoundland time)
6:00 a.m. to 4:30 a.m.
1:30 a.m. to 4:30 a.m. 7:00 a.m. to 6:30 p.m.
*During Daylight Savings Time, service hours in Saskatchewan coincide with Mountain time.
This service is not available 24 hours a day due to daily maintenance activities.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
